I am a Data and Society undergraduate student at CEU, and I also work in web development with a strong interest in data visualization. My election-related projects include Vox Populi's 2024 US polling aggregator and a vote advice application for the 2025 Romanian elections. My thesis will focus on low-coverage election-night estimation during the 2026 vote count, and I may also write about it on the Vox Populi blog.
